name: pwm_gen
interface: module pwm (input clk, input rst_n, input [3:0] duty, output reg pwm_out);
golden_rtl: module pwm(input clk, input rst_n, input [3:0] duty, output reg pwm_out); reg [3:0] cnt; always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) begin cnt<=4'd0; pwm_out<=1'b0; end else begin cnt<= (cnt==4'd15)?4'd0:cnt+4'd1; pwm_out<= (cnt < duty); end endmodule
property_tb:
`timescale 1ns/1ps
module tb; reg clk,rst_n; reg [3:0] duty; wire pwm_out; integer i,d,hi; reg [3:0] cnt_e; reg pwm_e; pwm dut(.clk(clk),.rst_n(rst_n),.duty(duty),.pwm_out(pwm_out)); initial clk=0; always #5 clk=~clk; initial begin rst_n=0; duty=4'd0; cnt_e=4'd0; pwm_e=1'b0; @(posedge clk); #1; rst_n=1; for(d=0;d<16;d=d+1) begin duty=d[3:0]; hi=0; for(i=0;i<16;i=i+1) begin @(posedge clk); #1; pwm_e=(cnt_e<duty); cnt_e=(cnt_e==4'd15)?4'd0:cnt_e+4'd1; if(pwm_out!==pwm_e) begin $display("FAIL duty=%0d cyc=%0d pwm=%b exp=%b",d,i,pwm_out,pwm_e); $finish; end if(pwm_out) hi=hi+1; end if(hi!==d) begin $display("FAIL duty=%0d highcount=%0d exp=%0d",d,hi,d); $finish; end end $display("PASS"); $finish; end initial begin #300000; $display("FAIL timeout"); $finish; end endmodule
buggy_rtl: module pwm(input clk, input rst_n, input [3:0] duty, output reg pwm_out); reg [3:0] cnt; always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) begin cnt<=4'd0; pwm_out<=1'b0; end else begin cnt<= (cnt==4'd15)?4'd0:cnt+4'd1; pwm_out<= (cnt <= duty); end endmodule

name: down_timer
interface: module dtimer (input clk, input rst_n, input load, input [7:0] n, output reg done);
golden_rtl: module dtimer(input clk, input rst_n, input load, input [7:0] n, output reg done); reg [7:0] cnt; reg run; always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) begin cnt<=8'd0; run<=1'b0; done<=1'b0; end else if(load) begin cnt<=n; run<=(n!=8'd0); done<=1'b0; end else if(run) begin if(cnt==8'd1) begin cnt<=8'd0; run<=1'b0; done<=1'b1; end else begin cnt<=cnt-8'd1; done<=1'b0; end end else done<=1'b0; endmodule
property_tb:
`timescale 1ns/1ps
module tb; reg clk,rst_n,load; reg [7:0] n; wire done; integer i,t; reg [7:0] cnt_e; reg run_e, done_e; dtimer dut(.clk(clk),.rst_n(rst_n),.load(load),.n(n),.done(done)); initial clk=0; always #5 clk=~clk; initial begin rst_n=0; load=1'b0; n=8'd0; cnt_e=8'd0; run_e=1'b0; done_e=1'b0; @(posedge clk); #1; rst_n=1; for(t=1;t<=12;t=t+1) begin load=1'b1; n=t[7:0]; @(posedge clk); #1; done_e=1'b0; run_e=(t!=0); cnt_e=t[7:0]; if(done!==done_e) begin $display("FAIL load t=%0d done=%b exp=%b",t,done,done_e); $finish; end load=1'b0; n=8'd0; for(i=0;i<t+2;i=i+1) begin @(posedge clk); #1; if(run_e) begin if(cnt_e==8'd1) begin cnt_e=8'd0; run_e=1'b0; done_e=1'b1; end else begin cnt_e=cnt_e-8'd1; done_e=1'b0; end end else done_e=1'b0; if(done!==done_e) begin $display("FAIL t=%0d cyc=%0d done=%b exp=%b",t,i,done,done_e); $finish; end end end $display("PASS"); $finish; end initial begin #300000; $display("FAIL timeout"); $finish; end endmodule
buggy_rtl: module dtimer(input clk, input rst_n, input load, input [7:0] n, output reg done); reg [7:0] cnt; reg run; always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) begin cnt<=8'd0; run<=1'b0; done<=1'b0; end else if(load) begin cnt<=n; run<=(n!=8'd0); done<=1'b0; end else if(run) begin if(cnt==8'd2) begin cnt<=8'd0; run<=1'b0; done<=1'b1; end else begin cnt<=cnt-8'd1; done<=1'b0; end end else done<=1'b0; endmodule

name: pw_meas
interface: module pw_meas (input clk, input rst_n, input sig, output reg [7:0] width);
golden_rtl: module pw_meas(input clk, input rst_n, input sig, output reg [7:0] width); reg [7:0] cnt; reg prev; always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) begin cnt<=8'd0; width<=8'd0; prev<=1'b0; end else begin prev<=sig; if(sig) cnt<=cnt+8'd1; else begin if(prev) width<=cnt; cnt<=8'd0; end end endmodule
property_tb:
`timescale 1ns/1ps
module tb; reg clk,rst_n,sig; wire [7:0] width; integer i; reg [7:0] cnt_e, width_e; reg prev_e; pw_meas dut(.clk(clk),.rst_n(rst_n),.sig(sig),.width(width)); initial clk=0; always #5 clk=~clk; initial begin rst_n=0; sig=1'b0; cnt_e=8'd0; width_e=8'd0; prev_e=1'b0; @(posedge clk); #1; rst_n=1; for(i=0;i<200;i=i+1) begin sig=$random; @(posedge clk); #1; if(sig) begin cnt_e=cnt_e+8'd1; end else begin if(prev_e) width_e=cnt_e; cnt_e=8'd0; end prev_e=sig; if(width!==width_e) begin $display("FAIL cyc=%0d sig=%b width=%0d exp=%0d",i,sig,width,width_e); $finish; end end $display("PASS"); $finish; end initial begin #300000; $display("FAIL timeout"); $finish; end endmodule
buggy_rtl: module pw_meas(input clk, input rst_n, input sig, output reg [7:0] width); reg [7:0] cnt; reg prev; always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) begin cnt<=8'd0; width<=8'd0; prev<=1'b0; end else begin prev<=sig; if(sig) cnt<=cnt+8'd1; else begin if(prev) width<=cnt+8'd1; cnt<=8'd0; end end endmodule

name: gated_cnt
interface: module gated_cnt (input clk, input rst_n, input en, output reg [7:0] q);
golden_rtl: module gated_cnt(input clk, input rst_n, input en, output reg [7:0] q); always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) q<=8'd0; else if(en) q<=q+8'd1; endmodule
property_tb:
`timescale 1ns/1ps
module tb; reg clk,rst_n,en; wire [7:0] q; integer i; reg [7:0] q_e; gated_cnt dut(.clk(clk),.rst_n(rst_n),.en(en),.q(q)); initial clk=0; always #5 clk=~clk; initial begin rst_n=0; en=1'b0; q_e=8'd0; @(posedge clk); #1; rst_n=1; for(i=0;i<200;i=i+1) begin en=$random; @(posedge clk); #1; if(en) q_e=q_e+8'd1; if(q!==q_e) begin $display("FAIL cyc=%0d en=%b q=%0d exp=%0d",i,en,q,q_e); $finish; end end $display("PASS"); $finish; end initial begin #300000; $display("FAIL timeout"); $finish; end endmodule
buggy_rtl: module gated_cnt(input clk, input rst_n, input en, output reg [7:0] q); always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) q<=8'd0; else q<=q+8'd1; endmodule

name: sat_cnt
interface: module sat_cnt (input clk, input rst_n, input inc, output reg [7:0] q);
golden_rtl: module sat_cnt(input clk, input rst_n, input inc, output reg [7:0] q); always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) q<=8'd0; else if(inc && q!=8'hFF) q<=q+8'd1; endmodule
property_tb:
`timescale 1ns/1ps
module tb; reg clk,rst_n,inc; wire [7:0] q; integer i; reg [7:0] q_e; sat_cnt dut(.clk(clk),.rst_n(rst_n),.inc(inc),.q(q)); initial clk=0; always #5 clk=~clk; initial begin rst_n=0; inc=1'b0; q_e=8'd0; @(posedge clk); #1; rst_n=1; inc=1'b1; for(i=0;i<300;i=i+1) begin @(posedge clk); #1; if(inc && q_e!=8'hFF) q_e=q_e+8'd1; if(q!==q_e) begin $display("FAIL cyc=%0d q=%0d exp=%0d",i,q,q_e); $finish; end end if(q_e!==8'hFF) begin $display("FAIL never saturated q=%0d",q_e); $finish; end $display("PASS"); $finish; end initial begin #300000; $display("FAIL timeout"); $finish; end endmodule
buggy_rtl: module sat_cnt(input clk, input rst_n, input inc, output reg [7:0] q); always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) q<=8'd0; else if(inc) q<=q+8'd1; endmodule

name: bcd_cnt
interface: module bcd_cnt (input clk, input rst_n, input en, output reg [3:0] q, output reg carry);
golden_rtl: module bcd_cnt(input clk, input rst_n, input en, output reg [3:0] q, output reg carry); always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) begin q<=4'd0; carry<=1'b0; end else if(en) begin if(q==4'd9) begin q<=4'd0; carry<=1'b1; end else begin q<=q+4'd1; carry<=1'b0; end end else carry<=1'b0; endmodule
property_tb:
`timescale 1ns/1ps
module tb; reg clk,rst_n,en; wire [3:0] q; wire carry; integer i; reg [3:0] q_e; reg carry_e; bcd_cnt dut(.clk(clk),.rst_n(rst_n),.en(en),.q(q),.carry(carry)); initial clk=0; always #5 clk=~clk; initial begin rst_n=0; en=1'b0; q_e=4'd0; carry_e=1'b0; @(posedge clk); #1; rst_n=1; for(i=0;i<120;i=i+1) begin en=$random; @(posedge clk); #1; if(en) begin if(q_e==4'd9) begin q_e=4'd0; carry_e=1'b1; end else begin q_e=q_e+4'd1; carry_e=1'b0; end end else carry_e=1'b0; if(q>4'd9) begin $display("FAIL cyc=%0d out-of-range q=%0d",i,q); $finish; end if(q!==q_e || carry!==carry_e) begin $display("FAIL cyc=%0d q=%0d exp=%0d carry=%b expc=%b",i,q,q_e,carry,carry_e); $finish; end end $display("PASS"); $finish; end initial begin #300000; $display("FAIL timeout"); $finish; end endmodule
buggy_rtl: module bcd_cnt(input clk, input rst_n, input en, output reg [3:0] q, output reg carry); always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) begin q<=4'd0; carry<=1'b0; end else if(en) begin if(q==4'd8) begin q<=4'd0; carry<=1'b1; end else begin q<=q+4'd1; carry<=1'b0; end end else carry<=1'b0; endmodule

name: bcd2_chain
interface: module bcd2 (input clk, input rst_n, input en, output reg [3:0] ones, output reg [3:0] tens, output reg carry);
golden_rtl: module bcd2(input clk, input rst_n, input en, output reg [3:0] ones, output reg [3:0] tens, output reg carry); always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) begin ones<=4'd0; tens<=4'd0; carry<=1'b0; end else if(en) begin if(ones==4'd9) begin ones<=4'd0; if(tens==4'd9) begin tens<=4'd0; carry<=1'b1; end else begin tens<=tens+4'd1; carry<=1'b0; end end else begin ones<=ones+4'd1; carry<=1'b0; end end else carry<=1'b0; endmodule
property_tb:
`timescale 1ns/1ps
module tb; reg clk,rst_n,en; wire [3:0] ones,tens; wire carry; integer i; reg [3:0] ones_e,tens_e; reg carry_e; bcd2 dut(.clk(clk),.rst_n(rst_n),.en(en),.ones(ones),.tens(tens),.carry(carry)); initial clk=0; always #5 clk=~clk; initial begin rst_n=0; en=1'b0; ones_e=4'd0; tens_e=4'd0; carry_e=1'b0; @(posedge clk); #1; rst_n=1; en=1'b1; for(i=0;i<130;i=i+1) begin @(posedge clk); #1; if(en) begin if(ones_e==4'd9) begin ones_e=4'd0; if(tens_e==4'd9) begin tens_e=4'd0; carry_e=1'b1; end else begin tens_e=tens_e+4'd1; carry_e=1'b0; end end else begin ones_e=ones_e+4'd1; carry_e=1'b0; end end else carry_e=1'b0; if(ones>4'd9 || tens>4'd9) begin $display("FAIL cyc=%0d range ones=%0d tens=%0d",i,ones,tens); $finish; end if(ones!==ones_e || tens!==tens_e || carry!==carry_e) begin $display("FAIL cyc=%0d ones=%0d/%0d tens=%0d/%0d c=%b/%b",i,ones,ones_e,tens,tens_e,carry,carry_e); $finish; end end $display("PASS"); $finish; end initial begin #300000; $display("FAIL timeout"); $finish; end endmodule
buggy_rtl: module bcd2(input clk, input rst_n, input en, output reg [3:0] ones, output reg [3:0] tens, output reg carry); always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) begin ones<=4'd0; tens<=4'd0; carry<=1'b0; end else if(en) begin ones<= (ones==4'd9)?4'd0:ones+4'd1; tens<= (tens==4'd9)?4'd0:tens+4'd1; carry<= (ones==4'd9 && tens==4'd9); end else carry<=1'b0; endmodule

name: ts_cnt
interface: module ts_cnt (input clk, input rst_n, output reg [7:0] ts, output reg wrapped);
golden_rtl: module ts_cnt(input clk, input rst_n, output reg [7:0] ts, output reg wrapped); always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) begin ts<=8'd0; wrapped<=1'b0; end else begin ts<=ts+8'd1; wrapped<= (ts==8'hFF); end endmodule
property_tb:
`timescale 1ns/1ps
module tb; reg clk,rst_n; wire [7:0] ts; wire wrapped; integer i; reg [7:0] ts_e; reg wr_e; ts_cnt dut(.clk(clk),.rst_n(rst_n),.ts(ts),.wrapped(wrapped)); initial clk=0; always #5 clk=~clk; initial begin rst_n=0; ts_e=8'd0; wr_e=1'b0; @(posedge clk); #1; rst_n=1; for(i=0;i<300;i=i+1) begin @(posedge clk); #1; wr_e=(ts_e==8'hFF); ts_e=ts_e+8'd1; if(ts!==ts_e || wrapped!==wr_e) begin $display("FAIL cyc=%0d ts=%0d exp=%0d wr=%b expw=%b",i,ts,ts_e,wrapped,wr_e); $finish; end end $display("PASS"); $finish; end initial begin #300000; $display("FAIL timeout"); $finish; end endmodule
buggy_rtl: module ts_cnt(input clk, input rst_n, output reg [7:0] ts, output reg wrapped); always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) begin ts<=8'd0; wrapped<=1'b0; end else begin ts<=ts+8'd1; wrapped<= (ts==8'hFE); end endmodule

name: watchdog
interface: module wdog (input clk, input rst_n, input kick, output reg timeout);
golden_rtl: module wdog(input clk, input rst_n, input kick, output reg timeout); reg [3:0] cnt; always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) begin cnt<=4'd0; timeout<=1'b0; end else if(kick) begin cnt<=4'd0; timeout<=1'b0; end else if(cnt==4'd8) begin timeout<=1'b1; end else begin cnt<=cnt+4'd1; timeout<=1'b0; end endmodule
property_tb:
`timescale 1ns/1ps
module tb; reg clk,rst_n,kick; wire timeout; integer i; reg [3:0] cnt_e; reg to_e; wdog dut(.clk(clk),.rst_n(rst_n),.kick(kick),.timeout(timeout)); initial clk=0; always #5 clk=~clk; initial begin rst_n=0; kick=1'b0; cnt_e=4'd0; to_e=1'b0; @(posedge clk); #1; rst_n=1; for(i=0;i<40;i=i+1) begin kick=(i%4==0)?1'b1:1'b0; @(posedge clk); #1; if(kick) begin cnt_e=4'd0; to_e=1'b0; end else if(cnt_e==4'd8) begin to_e=1'b1; end else begin cnt_e=cnt_e+4'd1; to_e=1'b0; end if(timeout!==to_e) begin $display("FAIL A cyc=%0d timeout=%b exp=%b",i,timeout,to_e); $finish; end end kick=1'b0; for(i=0;i<15;i=i+1) begin @(posedge clk); #1; if(kick) begin cnt_e=4'd0; to_e=1'b0; end else if(cnt_e==4'd8) begin to_e=1'b1; end else begin cnt_e=cnt_e+4'd1; to_e=1'b0; end if(timeout!==to_e) begin $display("FAIL B cyc=%0d timeout=%b exp=%b",i,timeout,to_e); $finish; end end if(to_e!==1'b1) begin $display("FAIL watchdog never fired"); $finish; end $display("PASS"); $finish; end initial begin #300000; $display("FAIL timeout"); $finish; end endmodule
buggy_rtl: module wdog(input clk, input rst_n, input kick, output reg timeout); reg [3:0] cnt; always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) begin cnt<=4'd0; timeout<=1'b0; end else if(kick) begin timeout<=1'b0; end else if(cnt==4'd8) begin timeout<=1'b1; end else begin cnt<=cnt+4'd1; timeout<=1'b0; end endmodule

name: freqdiv
interface: module freqdiv (input clk, input rst_n, input [3:0] div, output reg clk_out);
golden_rtl: module freqdiv(input clk, input rst_n, input [3:0] div, output reg clk_out); reg [3:0] cnt; always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) begin cnt<=4'd0; clk_out<=1'b0; end else if(cnt>=div-4'd1) begin cnt<=4'd0; clk_out<=1'b1; end else begin cnt<=cnt+4'd1; clk_out<=1'b0; end endmodule
property_tb:
`timescale 1ns/1ps
module tb; reg clk,rst_n; reg [3:0] div; wire clk_out; integer i,dv; reg [3:0] cnt_e; reg co_e; freqdiv dut(.clk(clk),.rst_n(rst_n),.div(div),.clk_out(clk_out)); initial clk=0; always #5 clk=~clk; initial begin rst_n=0; div=4'd1; cnt_e=4'd0; co_e=1'b0; @(posedge clk); #1; rst_n=1; for(dv=1;dv<=8;dv=dv+1) begin div=dv[3:0]; for(i=0;i<24;i=i+1) begin @(posedge clk); #1; if(cnt_e>=div-4'd1) begin cnt_e=4'd0; co_e=1'b1; end else begin cnt_e=cnt_e+4'd1; co_e=1'b0; end if(clk_out!==co_e) begin $display("FAIL div=%0d cyc=%0d out=%b exp=%b",dv,i,clk_out,co_e); $finish; end end end $display("PASS"); $finish; end initial begin #300000; $display("FAIL timeout"); $finish; end endmodule
buggy_rtl: module freqdiv(input clk, input rst_n, input [3:0] div, output reg clk_out); reg [3:0] cnt; always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) if(!rst_n) begin cnt<=4'd0; clk_out<=1'b0; end else if(cnt>=div) begin cnt<=4'd0; clk_out<=1'b1; end else begin cnt<=cnt+4'd1; clk_out<=1'b0; end endmodule
